sections.paragraph: an unused root which appears to have had the same meaning as פָּאַר, פּוּר No. II. to boil as a pot (whence figuratively Arab. فخر, فخز to swell up, to be proud); hence فَخَّارُ, فيخار a pot, a potter’s vessel, the former of these words also being used for a potter. A secondary word is the Syr. Ethpa. to form. [This is given as the primary meaning of the root in Thes.]
